positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical celestial diagram featuring abstract constellations, interconnected geometric zodiac symbols, crescent moons, and stylized nebulae rendered exclusively using intricate linework, fine engraving techniques, and precise dotwork stippling. The composition must be centered and circular, designed for immediate print readability. Style should mimic vintage scientific illustrations meets modern minimalist tattoo art. Use deep indigo ink tones against a cream background. Emphasis on sharp lines, extreme contrast, and clean, strong black silhouettes for commercial apparel printing.
negative: blur, grainy, amateur drawing, artifact, watermark, signature, text, readable words, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, overexposed, ugly, noisy
